title: Strategycatalog
description: insert_me mutation strategy catalog. Each entry describes one CWE family, its implementation maturity, planning suitability, and Juliet-derived rationale.

catalog_version.description: Catalog version tag, updated on each catalog revision.

maturity_levels.description: Definitions of each maturity level string.

strategies.description: One entry per CWE family / mutation strategy.

strategy_id.description: Unique strategy name used in code and seed files. Null for CANDIDATE/PLANNED entries without implementations.

vulnerability_class.description: Broad class such as 'Memory Safety -- Spatial' or 'Injection -- Format String'.

pattern_type.description: Seeder pattern type used to locate insertion sites (e.g., 'malloc_call', 'pointer_deref', 'free_call', 'null_guard', 'string_operation', 'array_index', 'format_string', 'custom').

suitable_for_planning.description: Whether the planning layer (CorpusPlanner) should include this strategy in corpus synthesis.

description.description: What the mutation does and why it creates the vulnerability.

juliet_rationale.description: How this strategy maps to Juliet test suite patterns.

source_pattern.description: Description of the code pattern that the strategy targets as its insertion site.

sink_pattern.description: Description of the code that becomes reachable / exploitable after mutation.

juliet_coverage.description: Glob-style pattern matching Juliet test case file names for this CWE.

deterministic.description: Whether the mutation is fully deterministic (same input always produces same output).

quality_gate_pass_rate.description: Empirical fraction of generated cases that pass the quality gate. Null if not yet measured.

corpus_cases.description: Total number of accepted corpus cases generated so far.

corpus_admission_blocker.description: Explanation of why corpus admission is blocked (for non-admitted strategies).

common_failure_modes.description: Known patterns that cause quality gate failure or NOOP/INVALID outcomes.
